web.title: 600 Miami World Center Residences | Prices & Floor Plans
web.description: 600 MWC Residences is a luxury development in the area of Downtown Miami, Florida. This is an amazing luxury tower with 32 stories and 579 Residences.
web.markdown:
![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image01.png?v=4d5d5b57)

Downtown Miami is about to get

600 times better…

[En español](https://es.600mwc.miami/)

[⬆︎](https://600mwc.miami/#gototop)

[![#home](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image14.png?v=4d5d5b57)](https://600mwc.miami/#home)

## 600 Miami World Center is the latest iconic, high-end urban living experience in the center of the new Downtown Miami.

32 stories and 579 fully furnished residences with the AirBnb Rental Capacity

**[Residences](https://600mwc.miami/#residences)**

**[Floor Plans](https://600mwc.miami/#floorplans)**

**[Amenities](https://600mwc.miami/#amenities)**

**[Latest News](https://600mwc.miami/#news)**

**[Location](https://600mwc.miami/#location)**

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://600mwc.miami/#prices)**

**[Contact Us](https://600mwc.miami/#contact)**

This is a great investment Opportunity in the New Center of Miami.

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

### Studios to 2 Bedroom configurations

## The Residences

• Fully finished and furnished residences thoughtfully curated by award-winning design firm, The Design Agency• Floor to ceiling glass windows with custom window treatment• All residences feature balconies• Finished flooring on all residential interiors• Kitchens and bathrooms feature custom Italian cabinetry and counters• Innovative household appliances featuring speed oven, integrated paneled refrigerator/freezer and dishwasher• Top-of-the line, separate, in-unit washers and dryers• Fully built-out, generous closets

Click the photos for more details

- [![Fully finished and furnished residences thoughtfully curated](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/gallery02/3c1c734f_original.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

- [![All residences feature balconies](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/gallery02/1b419845_original.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)
- [![Finished flooring on all residential interiors](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/gallery02/3c951ba4_original.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

- [![Elegant Kitchens](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/gallery02/5e1bb1fd_original.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image09.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

600 Miami World Center will be the latest condominium tower with the highly profitable capacity for short term rentals (AirBnB)

## Newest tower for lucrative short-term rentals.

Featuring Studios to 2 Bedroom configurations in the most spectacular area of Miami of recent times: The Miami World Center, the new center of the city with a blend of retail, office, hospitality, and residential offerings in one unique location.

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://600mwc.miami/#prices)**

**[Floor Plans](https://600mwc.miami/#floorplans)**

**[Location](https://600mwc.miami/#location)**

**[Contact Us](https://600mwc.miami/#contact)**

### Amenities and Common Areas

## Luxury Amenities

• Covered porte-cochère• 24-Hour attended lobby• Luxer one automated parcel storage• Dedicated co-working space• Resident lounge and entertaining space• Air conditioned resident storage• Bike storage• Summer kitchen• Rooftop swimming pool with resort seating• World-class state-of-the-art fitness center with outdoor private training area by Homage Fitness• Located within Miami World Center - the new capital of business, commerce, hospitality and more• Walking distance to FTX Arena, Biscayne Bay Waterfront, Museum Park, and other key destinations• Seconds from Brightline, Metrorail, Metromover, and major highways• Minutes to Miami International Airport by car or train

Click the photos for more details

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[601 NE 1st Ave, Miami, FL 33132](https://www.google.com/maps/place/600+NE+1st+Ave,+Miami,+FL+33132/@25.7802523,-80.194653,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x88d9b69f57763953:0xde39315d560c5fe2!8m2!3d25.7802523!4d-80.192459?coh=164777&entry=tt&shorturl=1)

Brickell: 10 minutes’ walkMuseums & Arena: 5 minutes’ walkTrain to Orlando: 3 minutes’ walkWynwood: 5 minutes’ driveMiami Beaches: 15 minutes’ driveMiami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive

### LATest NEWS

## 600 Miami World Center continues its vertical development

The short-term rental residential tower that has been a best-seller in 2023 is now reaching its 20th floor and is completely sold out. The Miami World Center area continues to expand each day…Updated on: 05/13/2025

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

## THE TEAM

The Aria team has an incredible portfolio of over ten years. The team places a strong emphasis on business relationships and local knowledge. Their main focus are markets where they have been operating for years and have strong connections to the real estate community: Miami, New York and Washington. Some of their Miami investments include [501 First](https://miamiresidential.com/501first) and [YotelPad](https://miamiresidential.com/yotelpad/).Merrimac Ventures is a Florida-based development firm. Its investments include resort, mixed-use, multi-family residential, condominiums, retail and office developments. Their projects are transformational, as they help and advance cities. Some of their prestigious investments include [Paramount Miami World Center](https://miamiresidential.com/paramount/) and [The Crosby](https://miamiresidential.com/thecrosby).

## BE A PART OF THE TRENDY BUSINESS WITH AIRBNB AND ALL OTHER ONLINE VACATION RENTAL MARKETPLACES!

This is a great opportunity to generate daily passive income with Airbnb, [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/), and all the Short Term Rentals platforms using your own luxury residential unit at 600 Miami World Center. You can do it yourself, with the building on-site personnel, or with any property management company.Tourism in Miami is booming like never before, daily rates for hotels and vacation rentals are getting more and more expensive each season, this is your opportunity to take advantage of this great business and not only own an asset that multiplies its value over time, but also generate great monthly returns with it!

- [Learn More](https://www.600mwc.miami/contact)

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

![](https://600mwc.miami/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=4d5d5b57)

### Pricing & Payment Structure

## Price Ranges

Studios from $520k

1 Bedrooms from $595k

1 Bedroom + Den from $778k

2 Bedrooms from $794k

# 600 Miami World Center

### **Downtown Miami / 2027**

32 Stories / 579 Residences of
Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms Bedrooms

**600 NE 1st Ave, Miami, FL 33132, USA**

[+1.305.647.2665](tel:13056472665)

600 Miami World Center will be the latest condominium tower with the highly profitable capacity for short term rentals (AirBnB) featuring Studios to 2 Bedroom configurations in the most spectacular area of Miami of recent times: The Miami World Center, the new center of the city with a blend of retail, office, hospitality, and residential offerings in one unique location.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $520,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/600miamiworldcenter/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

Studios from $520k

## Features

### Building Features

- Covered porte-cochère
- 24-Hour attended lobby
- Luxer one automated parcel storage
- Dedicated co-working space
- Resident lounge and entertaining space
- Air conditioned resident storage
- Bike storage
- Summer kitchen
- Rooftop swimming pool with resort seating
- World-class state-of-the-art fitness center with outdoor private training area by Homage Fitness
- Located within Miami World Center - the new capital of business, commerce, hospitality and more
- Walking distance to FTX Arena, Biscayne Bay Waterfront, Museum Park, and other key destinations
- Seconds from Brightline, Metrorail, Metromover, and major highways
- Minutes to Miami International Airport by car or train

### Residence Features

- Fully finished and furnished residences thoughtfully curated by award-winning design firm, The Design Agency
- Floor to ceiling glass windows with custom window treatment
- All residences feature balconies
- Finished flooring on all residential interiors
- Kitchens and bathrooms feature custom Italian cabinetry and counters
- Innovative household appliances featuring speed oven, integrated paneled refrigerator/freezer and dishwasher
- Top-of-the line, separate, in-unit washers and dryers
- Fully built-out, generous closets

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/20-600-Miami-World-Center-Living-Room-Details-e1678226774914.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/02-Developers-Aria-and-Merrimac.jpg)

The Aria team has an incredible portfolio of over ten years. The team places a strong emphasis on business relationships and local knowledge. Their main focus are markets where they have been operating for years and have strong connections to the real estate community: Miami, New York and Washington. Some of their Miami investments include [501 First](https://miamiresidential.com/501first) and [YotelPad](https://miamiresidential.com/yotelpad/).

Merrimac Ventures is a Florida-based development firm. Its investments include resort, mixed-use, multi-family residential, condominiums, retail and office developments. Their projects are transformational, as they help and advance cities. Some of their prestigious investments include [Paramount Miami World Center](https://miamiresidential.com/paramount/) and [The Crosby.](https://miamiresidential.com/thecrosby)
